title: Cancellation window
content: Orders can be cancelled before fulfillment. After shipment, cancellation is unavailable and return policy applies.

title: Refund timeline
content: Approved refunds are typically processed to the original payment method within 5-7 business days.

title: Tracking updates
content: Tracking events can take up to 24 hours to refresh after carrier scans.

title: Recommendations policy
content: Product recommendations are based on current catalog availability and may change as inventory updates.

title: Manual escalation policy
content: If a customer requests a human agent or policy confidence is low, create a handoff ticket immediately and preserve full audit history.

title: Karungali Mala (Sacred Black Wood)
content: Karungali mala is a holy necklace made from black ebony wood, sourced from the heartwood of the Karungali tree. It is deeply rooted in Tamil spiritual tradition and provides subtle protection throughout the day. It acts as a shield against negative external influences like the 'evil eye' or 'black magic'. Astrologically, it balances Planet Mars (Mangal) and is recommended for Mars Dosha. It brings prosperity, success, focus, calmness, and supports spiritual growth. DOS: Touch only with clean hands. Store safely with intention and respect. Start wearing on auspicious days with a calm mindset. DON'TS: Remove during bathing, sleep, and intimacy (as its energy is masculine and protective and must maintain sacred vibration). Avoid non-veg food and alcohol while wearing.

title: Healing Crystals & Stones Guide
content: Agate: Grounding, emotional healing, sleep, financial discipline. Amethyst: Calm mind, anxiety relief, sleep, spiritual growth. Aventurine: Calm, prosperity, luck, heart chakra. Citrine: Positivity, wealth, success, motivation. Fluorite: Mental clarity, focus, energy protection. Hematite: Focus, grounding, stress control. Jasper: Emotional stability, stamina. Lapis Lazuli: Mental clarity, honest expression. Lava Stone: Grounding, personal transformation. Moonstone: Lunar balance, empathy. Obsidian: Emotional healing, energy cleansing. Onyx: Protection, emotional strength. Pyrite: Confidence, motivation, wealth. Quartz: Energy amplification, space cleansing. Sodalite: Focus, clear communication. Sunstone: Self-confidence, luck. Tiger's Eye: Courage, decision-making. Tourmaline: Anxiety relief, emotional protection.

title: Rudraksha Mukhi Guide
content: Rudraksha beads are dried seeds of the Elaeocarpus ganitrus tree, legendarily from Lord Shiva's tears. They have electromagnetic properties that stabilize heart rate and reduce stress. MUKHIS (Faces): 1 Mukhi (Shiva): Spiritual awakening. 2 Mukhi (Ardhanarishwar): Emotional/relationship balance. 3 Mukhi (Agni): Transformation. 4 Mukhi (Brahma): Knowledge/focus. 5 Mukhi (Rudra): Health, peace of mind (Most common). 6 Mukhi (Kartikeya): Willpower. 7 Mukhi (Laxmi): Wealth, abundance. 8 Mukhi (Ganesha): Obstacle removal. 9 Mukhi (Nav Durga): Power, protection. 10 Mukhi (Vishnu): Harmony. 11 Mukhi (Hanuman): Courage, protection. 12 Mukhi (Suryadev): Leadership. 13 Mukhi (Kamdev): Attraction. 14 Mukhi (Shiva/Kuber): Intuition. Ganesh Mukhi: Wisdom. Gauri Shankar: Divine union, relationship harmony.
